name: The Draughtsmen's Field Cabinet
description: A heavy oak field cabinet bolted to the interior wall of the tower's first-floor office, containing rolled blueprints, cost ledgers, and the official bore log — the paper spine of the entire project.
atmosphericDetails: The smell of damp blueprint linen and graphite is strong here — the cabinet has been open recently, the brass latch still warm.
A gas lamp on the adjacent table has been burning low, suggesting someone was working here within the last hour.
The bore log binder shows a gap where three pages have been removed — the torn edges are still visible at the spine.
